characters.name: Nico
characters.description: Nico BellicProbably 0.5 seconds before he says a slurAliasesNinja, Take two interactive legal target 325RelativesDeceasedAffiliationGetting AngryOccupationFuture Pro GamerBiographical informationMarital statusDivorcedDate of birth2006 (age 18)Place of birthTomato TownPlace of deathSalty SpringsPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderApache HelicopterHeight4'2WeightFatEye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byBrendan FraserAppears inMariokart: Super circuit, Super Smash Bros. UltimateDebutXbox Game PassIt is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world. It is the heavenly fount from which pours the light that shines across America. Its luminance guides and protects all Gamers. American mythology states that Nico is the creator of all things. Nico was just a regular kid, caught in the alluring grip of the virtual world. His addiction to Fortnite had consumed him, leading to a frenzy of V-buck purchases that left him drowning in debt. Desperate to escape the consequences, Nico found himself drawn into the seedy underbelly of crime. Nico's desperation led him down a treacherous path. He turned to drug trafficking as a means of survival, risking everything to stay one step ahead of the law. The horrors of the criminal underworld unfolded before his eyes - the ruthless betrayals, the unforgiving violence, the haunting specter of murder and homicide. Nico's once-innocent world was shattered beyond repair. Nico's descent into the criminal world was swift and brutal. Driven by a relentless determination, he clawed his way up the ranks of the underworld with ruthless cunning. He shed his innocence and embraced a new persona, navigating a world of treachery and betrayal. He formed alliances and made enemies, his once-clear moral compass shattered beyond recognition. Nico's past faded into a distant haze as he embraced the darkness that enveloped him. The violence and bloodshed became his new norm, a constant presence in his life. He had become a formidable player in the underground crime ring, his reputation spreading far and wide. His once-innocent soul now hardened by the horrors he had witnessed and committed. Nico's story was a dark and twisted tale of a boy who had lost his way in a world of vice and crime. His journey was stained with the blood of his victims and the scars of his own actions. Nico's realization came too late, as he found himself forever trapped in the murky depths of the underworld, a shadow of his former self. The horrors he had witnessed and the choices he had made had irreversibly changed him, leaving him to face the consequences of his actions for the rest of his days.
